description: Four 'closed' exception sets ({1,2,3}=27, {1,2,4}=64, {1,2,5}=374, {1,2,6}=1834) are declared closed based on finite search up to 10^11, but no completeness certificate or branch-and-bound argument is provided. Current literature establishes only 'full density' not finite-exception results. Should be rephrased as conjectural.
action_taken: Changed "confirmed closed" to "computationally observed, no new exceptions when extending search range." Added caveat: cannot rigorously prove finiteness. Commit 5e89f99.
